channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Soto's record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets reverberates through Major League Baseball
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Shortly after striking a record $765 million, 15-year contract for Juan Soto with the New York Mets, agent Scott Boras walked into Nick & Sam's, a restaurant near the winter meetings hotel, with about a dozen of his staff.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM and STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, Miami's Ward are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon’s Dillon Gabriel, Colorado’s Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty and Miami’s Cam Ward have been announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tennessee grabs No. 1 in AP Top 25 after shakeup; No. 3 Iowa State has highest ranking since 1950s
item.description: Tennessee is the new No. 1 in men's college basketball after a massive shakeup in the AP Top 25. The Vols received 58 first-place votes from a 62-person media panel Monday to reach No. 1 for the first time since the 2018-19 season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Belichick says he's had 'good conversations' with UNC chancellor amid Tar Heels' coaching search
item.description: Former New England Patriots coach and six-time Super Bowl champion Bill Belichick said Monday he had “a couple of good conversations” with North Carolina Chancellor Lee Roberts amid his discussions about the Tar Heels' head-coaching job.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Blind former college football player has clever zinger after OnlyFans model says she was asked to flash team
item.description: A blind former college football player weighed in after an OnlyFans model said she was asked to flash an opposing NFL team for free tickets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs win 9th straight AFC West title, beating Chargers 19-17 on bank-shot field goal
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Andy Reid doesn't need to schedule a stress test anytime soon. He seems to get one every week.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SMALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press. The deal could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to MLB-record $765 million deal with Mets: reports
item.description: Juan Soto has landed in Queens, as the New York Mets reportedly dished out an MLB-record $765 million contract over 15 years, smashing Shohei Ohtani's deal from last offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chris Paul moves into 2nd on NBA's career assists list against Pelicans
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — San Antonio Spurs point guard Chris Paul moved to second on the NBA's all-time assists list against the New Orleans Pelicans, the franchise where his 20-year career began, on Sunday The 39-year-old Paul collected his 12,092nd assist on a 3-pointer from Victor Wembanyama with 7:06
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams hold off Bills in NFL's highest-scoring game of 2024 season
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams and Buffalo Bills totaled the most points in an NFL game so far this season, but it was Matthew Stafford & Co. that outlasted Josh Allen and his group in the end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — The LA Galaxy finished 26th in the 29-team Major League Soccer standings just one season ago, and their biggest supporters boycotted certain matches to protest a decade of poor performance.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former BYU coach Bronco Mendenhall takes over at Utah State
item.description: The former Brigham Young University head coach will be taking over the football program at Utah State University.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks receives send off before title game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Montrose High School’s Red Hawks are on the brink of history, entering the state championship game with a perfect record. For a team that hasn’t claimed a title in more than 70 years, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: St. Pete City Council votes in favor of bond purchase to pay for Rays stadium
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council voted Thursday in favor of purchasing bonds that would fund a portion of the new Rays stadium and the redevelopment of the Gas Plant District.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks' losing streak reaches 4 games after 4-2 loss to Bruins
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Brad Marchand and Morgan Geekie each scored two goals, and the Boston Bruins beat the struggling Chicago Blackhawks, 4-2 , on Wednesday night. Boston posted its third consecutive win — all in the past four days. It rallied for a 3-2 overtime victory against Detroit on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
